title: Crispy Fish
description: This mod adds deep-fried crispy fish
body:
![Crispy Fish](https://bobophones.github.io/img/logo/crispy_fish.png)

# This mod adds deep-fried crispy fish

This addon of BlockDonald's Delight turns ordinary fish into an appetizing dish with a golden crust and increased nutritional value: by deep-frying it, the player gets a crispy snack that restores more satiety and satiety than standard cooked fish

![Crispy fish](https://bobophones.github.io/img/screenshot/crispy_fish_0.png)
